title: Yeastar PSE, integrations, AI, security, HA
summary: The beyond-baseline feature set: CRM and helpdesk integrations, Microsoft 365 / Google Workspace and Teams CTI, AI Receptionist and AI Toolbox, reporting and call accounting, security hardening (SIP TLS, SRTP, roles, 2FA), and HA / SD-WAN / backup and deep-troubleshooting.
